rows.description: Computus Dni Rectoris a 2do Die Novm 1814
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash for correct row splitting and accurate description. Other models (gpt-5-mini, claude-haiku) merged this with the next line.
Selected gemini-flash for correct row splitting and accurate description. Other models (gpt-5-mini, claude-haiku) merged this with the previous line.
Selected gpt-5-mini for accurate description and correct row_type. Gemini-flash missed an 'r' in 'Arrearagia'. Claude-haiku had incorrect row_type ('entry') and slightly different description.
Selected gpt-5-mini for accurate description and correct row_type. Gemini-flash had a typo ('Repts' instead of 'Rents'). Claude-haiku had incorrect row_type ('entry').

Selected gemini-flash. Description is accurate, amount £135 confirmed from image. Shillings and pence are indicated by dashes on the page, so left empty. Claude-haiku extracted incorrect amounts. Gpt-5-mini had a less accurate description and interpreted dashes as zeros.

Selected gemini-flash. Description is accurate, amount £136 confirmed from image. Shillings and pence are indicated by dashes on the page, so left empty. Claude-haiku extracted incorrect amounts. Gpt-5-mini had a less accurate description and interpreted dashes as zeros.

Selected gemini-flash. Description 'Little Tew' is accurate, amount 10s confirmed from image. Pounds and pence are indicated by dashes on the page, so left empty. Claude-haiku missed the amount. Gpt-5-mini had a less accurate description and interpreted dashes as zeros.
Selected gemini-flash. This row 'Banwell' is clearly visible as an entry without an amount on the page. Other models (gpt-5-mini, claude-haiku) missed this row.
Consensus on description and row_type between gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini. Claude-haiku had a very incorrect and over-inclusive description.

Selected gpt-5-mini. Confirmed from image that 'Kidlington Rectory' is a distinct entry with no associated monetary amount. Gemini-flash incorrectly assigned an amount (4.19.0) to this row. Claude-haiku missed this row by merging it with a header.

Selected gpt-5-mini. Confirmed from image that 'Vicarage' is the entry with the amount 4.19.0. The dash in the pence column indicates zero pence. Gemini-flash misidentified this section entirely by creating non-existent rows. Claude-haiku missed this row.
Consensus on description and row_type between gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini. Claude-haiku had an incorrect row_type ('entry') and pluralized 'Variables'.

Selected gemini-flash. Pounds amount is clearly 17 from the image, not 171 as extracted by gpt-5-mini. Shillings 11 and pence 0 (from dot/dash) confirmed visually. Claude-haiku's description was largely incorrect and missed the pence value.

Consensus on monetary amounts (42.9.4½) across all extractors. Description 'Middleton Stills Do 2 Years' constructed from the most accurate parts of gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini, and verified against the image.
Selected gemini-flash. Amounts £10, s4, p11 confirmed by image and consensus with gpt-5-mini. Gemini-flash had the most accurate description. Claude-haiku had incorrect pence and description.

Selected gemini-flash. Description 'Clifton Ferry' confirmed from image. Amounts £9, s11, p0 confirmed by image (dash for pence implies zero) and consensus with gpt-5-mini. Gpt-5-mini and Claude-haiku had incorrect descriptions.

Selected gemini-flash. Description 'Benington' confirmed from image. Amounts £8, s0, p1 confirmed from image (dash for shillings). Gpt-5-mini had incorrect shillings and pence. Claude-haiku had incorrect description.
Selected gemini-flash. Description 'Tretkewin' confirmed from image. Amounts £4, s2, p0 confirmed from image (dash for pence). Gpt-5-mini and Claude-haiku incorrectly read the pounds as 44.
Selected gemini-flash for accurate description and correct row_type. Gpt-5-mini had a typo ('Ten' instead of 'Tew'). Claude-haiku missed this header entirely.
Consensus on description and monetary amounts between gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini. Claude-haiku had incorrect description and pence.

Selected gemini-flash. Pounds amount is clearly 12 from the image, not 13 as extracted by gpt-5-mini. Description 'P. Fidge Do' and remaining amounts s15, p6 confirmed from image. Claude-haiku was significantly incorrect.

Selected gemini-flash. Amounts £12, s19, p10 confirmed from image and consensus with gpt-5-mini. Gemini-flash had the most accurate description ('A. Gibbins') compared to gpt-5-mini's 'Atkins'. Claude-haiku was significantly incorrect.
Consensus on description and monetary amounts between gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini. Claude-haiku was largely incorrect.

Consensus on monetary amounts across all extractors. Selected gemini-flash's description 'Kimber Do' as slightly more accurate than Claude-haiku's 'Kimber & d'. Gemini-flash's note regarding the '2' digit for pounds is a good example of careful reading.
Selected gemini-flash. Amounts £36, s12, p11, f0.5 confirmed from image (pence clearly '11' before the fraction). Gpt-5-mini misread pence as '1'. Claude-haiku was significantly incorrect.
Selected gemini-flash for accurate description and correct row_type. Gpt-5-mini missed 'Comyns' from the header. Claude-haiku had a very inaccurate description.

Selected gemini-flash for description 'Do Wilson' and accurate reading of amounts as 8s 8d. The pounds column is blank, so left empty (gemini-flash used 0). Gpt-5-mini and Claude-haiku had significantly incorrect descriptions and/or amounts.

Selected gemini-flash. Description 'Do Pickford' and amounts 6s confirmed from image. Pounds and pence columns are blank (dashes), so left empty (gemini-flash used 0). Gpt-5-mini and Claude-haiku incorrectly read the 6 as pounds.

Selected gemini-flash. Description 'Medenham' confirmed from image. Amounts £1, s10, p0 confirmed from image (dash for pence implies zero). Gpt-5-mini had an incorrect description. Claude-haiku missed the pence value.

Selected gemini-flash. Description 'Do' and amounts 6s confirmed from image. Pounds and pence columns are blank (dashes), so left empty (gemini-flash used 0). Gpt-5-mini incorrectly read the 6 as pounds. Claude-haiku missed this row.

Monetary amounts £613, s19, p1 are a consensus between gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini. Description 'Receipha Anni presentes' manually transcribed from image as none of the extractors were fully accurate. Claude-haiku had incorrect amounts and slightly inaccurate description.
Consensus on description and row_type between gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini. Claude-haiku included text from the next row in its description.

Selected gemini-flash. Description 'Dividend on New 1.0.' and amounts £19, s3, p8 confirmed from image. Gpt-5-mini had incorrect pounds and description. Claude-haiku had incorrect shillings and description.
Consensus on monetary amounts between all extractors. Selected gemini-flash's description 'Do Do' as it is more accurate than Claude-haiku's '& d'.

Monetary amounts £38, s7, p4 are a consensus across all extractors. Description field is empty, as there is no visible text on the image for this total line. Selected gemini-flash's empty description as correct. Gpt-5-mini used the amount as description; Claude-haiku invented 'Total'.
